Please briefly summarize today's main news.
Explain the latest trends in artificial intelligence technology.
Tell me about Korean traditional food culture.
Analyze the impact of climate change on the Earth's environment.
Explain the key features and advantages of the Rust programming language.
Introduce the history and cultural landmarks of Seoul.
Discuss the impact of smartphones on modern society.
Explain the importance of healthy eating habits and regular exercise.
Describe the types and future potential of renewable energy.
Tell me how large language models work and their applications.
